Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. The Xkcd thing, now interactive 1155 upvotes, 153 comments
  2. We've freed Cookie's Bustle from copyright hell 96 upvotes, 10 comments
  3. Physics Girl: Super-Kamiokande – Imaging the sun by detecting neutrinos [video] 429 upvotes, 68 comments
  4. TorchLean: Formalizing Neural Networks in Lean 74 upvotes, 9 comments
  5. An Interactive Intro to CRDTs (2023) 95 upvotes, 16 comments
  6. Motorola GrapheneOS devices will be bootloader unlockable/relockable 20 upvotes, 1 comments
  7. Voxile: A ray-traced game made in its own engine and programming language 108 upvotes, 20 comments
  8. Textadept 74 upvotes, 15 comments
  9. My take on vibe coding for PMs 9 upvotes, 0 comments
  10. You can use newline characters in URLs 9 upvotes, 0 comments
  11. Time, Space, and Life as We Know It (2017) 9 upvotes, 0 comments
  12. 130k Lines of Formal Topology: Simple and Cheap Autoformalization for Everyone? 9 upvotes, 0 comments
  13. Possible US Government iPhone-Hacking Toolkit in foreign spy and criminal hands 193 upvotes, 62 comments
  14. Claude's Cycles [pdf] 18 upvotes, 2 comments
  15. Launch HN: Cekura (YC F24) – Testing and monitoring for voice and chat AI agents 72 upvotes, 19 comments
  16. Lenovo's New ThinkPads Score 10/10 for Repairability 212 upvotes, 73 comments
  17. Claude's Cycles [pdf] 478 upvotes, 215 comments
  18. You can't use a code editor when you're under 18 now? 37 upvotes, 11 comments
  19. Talos: Hardware accelerator for deep convolutional neural networks 47 upvotes, 16 comments
  20. What’s in a name? (2014) 10 upvotes, 1 comments
  21. Disable Your SSH access accidentally with scp 101 upvotes, 48 comments
  22. I'm reluctant to verify my identity or age for any online services 885 upvotes, 548 comments
  23. Don't become an engineering manager 310 upvotes, 225 comments
  24. GPT‑5.3 Instant 297 upvotes, 226 comments
  25. Intel's make-or-break 18A process node debuts for data center with 288-core Xeon 250 upvotes, 196 comments
  26. Don't make me talk to your chatbot 218 upvotes, 177 comments
  27. Marcus AI Claims Dataset 57 upvotes, 39 comments
  28. MacBook Pro with M5 Pro and M5 Max 679 upvotes, 665 comments
  29. When AI writes the software, who verifies it? 149 upvotes, 140 comments
  30. MacBook Air with M5 377 upvotes, 420 comments

Last generated 10:30am, 4 March 2026. Source here.
